name: Oriental Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the diced tomatoes, sesame seed oil, extra virgin olive oil, Thai chili pepper, chopped cilantro, scallions, and red onions.
2. Stir in the oyster sauce and dark soy sauce.
3. Taste the mixture and add salt and pepper to your liking.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1/2 hour before serving.
